name: Metal Frog Solid : Road to Revenge

reviews.review_title: Its Frogger from the arcade in VR
reviews.review_description:
Never thought I would be playing a Frogger type game in VR, but here it is. This time the frog is back with a vengeance. 

The game was a little tricky at first to get the hang of the moves, but once you do its a walk in the park to control. 

The gameplay made me feel like I was a kid again back in the arcades, but this time inside the world. Moving from lane to lane and trashing cars with your powers. 

Its a fun VR title that's simple and fun to play, melts the time away. If you are looking for some classic arcade vibes in VR, this game is for you.

This is a great game your a frog that eats metal to get a bionic metal Tongue that can whip and throw cars like crazy and you have like a energy blast or missiles to knock them away while you try to dodge and survive the onslaught of cars as they try to smash you 


This game is alil difficult at first but it’s fun enough to have you going back for another go trying to survive till the end and get all the challenges while doing so With some unique tongue mechanics having me head banging and shaking my head like crazy to slam cars into the ground and other cars causing destruction all around me While I dodged cars in a way that gave me some nostalgic frogger vibes
